signal_log.note: Fresh strikes and whale prediction-market divergence create fast geopolitical risk context for defense, nuclear fuel, and safe-haven sleeves. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil rallying on Iran/Hormuz, inflation and macro watch
signal_log.note: USO rose roughly 5% week-over-week as Hormuz disruption stayed relevant; matters as inflation/rates input ahead of FOMC. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil spike on renewed Iran-US strikes
signal_log.ticker: USO, ITA, LEU, UUUU, CCJ, BWXT, BE
signal_log.note: Oil shock can pressure AI-heavy multiples through inflation/rates while supporting defense and nuclear/critical-minerals watch sleeves. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil down on US-Iran de-escalation and nuclear-deal expectations
signal_log.ticker: LEU, UUUU, CCJ, BWXT, BE, ITA
signal_log.note: Lower oil and yields create a risk-on book tailwind but mixed read for nuclear, energy-transition, and defense sleeves; oil direction is the hard tell. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Metals tariffs raised, effective June 8
signal_log.note: Higher metals tariffs and ended exemptions are a policy tailwind for domestic materials and critical-minerals exposure. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Growth-to-value rotation is pressuring held semis/AI exposure
signal_log.ticker: SMH, NVDA, MU, MAGS, GRNY, GRNJ, IGV, IVES, VOLT, QQQ
signal_log.note: Fundstrat Daily Technical Strategy says the June 5 drawdown looked like rotation from Growth into Value rather than a broad-market top. Semis and QQQ cracked while Healthcare, Energy, Materials, Industrials, and Financials held up better. Watch-only for held AI/semis concentration; no trade call.

signal_log.signal: QQQ and SOX support bands define next-week damage-control watch
signal_log.note: Fundstrat flagged QQQ roughly 703-705 and SOX roughly 12,114 as the first important support zones after the June 5 break. If those zones fail, the note shifts toward a deeper second leg lower. Watch-only timing signal for held semis and AI beta.

signal_log.signal: UW market tide stayed deeply risk-off into the June 5 close
signal_log.note: Unusual Whales market tide closed with sharply negative net call premium, positive net put premium, and negative net volume, confirming broad tape stress rather than an isolated single-name move. Watch-only flow context.

signal_log.signal: Strong jobs plus higher yields widened the broad tech drawdown
signal_log.note: AP market coverage on June 5 said a stronger-than-expected May jobs print pushed Treasury yields higher and helped trigger a tech-led selloff. Broad-market confirmation matches the Fundstrat rotation read. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: TNX and crude reversal path still depends on Persian Gulf de-escalation
signal_log.note: Fundstrat Flash Insights argued yields could peak into next week and crude could keep easing if negotiation progress arrives in the Persian Gulf. This keeps rates/oil headline sensitivity live for financials, energy, and nuclear sleeves. Watch-only until confirmed.

signal_log.signal: Semis are bouncing premarket but Friday damage still sets the watch frame
signal_log.ticker: SMH, NVDA, MU, MAGS, GRNY, IVES
signal_log.note: Reuters on June 8 said S&P 500 and Nasdaq futures were higher premarket while Nvidia, Broadcom, and Micron rose roughly 1.5% to 3.9% after Friday's chip rout. Stabilization only; renewed Middle East strikes were still keeping investors cautious. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Latest UW market-tide proof still shows a deeply risk-off close
signal_log.note: As of 8:37 AM ET on Monday, June 8, the latest open-session Unusual Whales market-tide data still ends on Friday, June 5 at 4:10 PM ET, with about -1.27B net call premium, +222M net put premium, and roughly -4.06M net volume. Treat that as the last confirmed broad-flow proof until Monday cash-session data exists. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Urenco expansion extends the domestic enrichment backdrop for nuclear sleeves
signal_log.note: Reuters-reported coverage from June 2 said Urenco plans to increase U.S. enrichment capacity by nearly 50% to supply nuclear plants. This is slower-moving supply-chain context rather than an immediate catalyst, but it supports ongoing attention on uranium and fuel-cycle exposure. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Chip rebound extended for a second day on June 9
signal_log.ticker: SMH, NVDA, MU, MAGS, GRNY, GRNJ, IVES, VOLT
signal_log.note: Reuters market coverage on Tuesday, June 9, 2026 said U.S. stock-index futures were higher and Nvidia, Broadcom, and Micron were up roughly 0.8% to 4.4% premarket as easing Middle East hostilities aided sentiment. This helps the held semis and AI sleeves, but it is still only a rebound watch after Friday's damage. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Treasury yields stayed elevated above 4.5% into June 9
signal_log.note: Reuters rates and FX coverage on Tuesday, June 9, 2026 said the benchmark U.S. 10-year yield stayed above 4.5% while the 2-year hovered near a 15-month high as rate-hike expectations remained elevated. That keeps duration-sensitive semis under macro pressure while leaving the higher-yield backdrop supportive for financials. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Latest UW market tide flipped call-premium positive by the June 8 close, but volume stayed negative
signal_log.note: As of 8:39 AM ET on Tuesday, June 9, 2026, the latest Unusual Whales market-tide rows run through Monday, June 8, 2026 at 4:10 PM ET. The final row showed about +224.3M net call premium, -124.6M net put premium, and roughly -475.8k net volume. That is materially better than the June 5 risk-off close, but the still-negative net volume means the rebound breadth needs confirmation. Watch-only.

signal_log.signal: Oil gave back most war-spike gains after June 9 halt-attacks headlines
signal_log.note: Reuters commodity coverage on Tuesday, June 9, 2026 said oil fell and erased most of the previous session's gains after Iran and Israel said they had halted attacks, though clarity remained limited. This eases the immediate inflation and rates pressure versus Monday's spike, but it leaves the nuclear, defense, and event-risk watch lanes live. Watch-only.
